methods.description: Field collections were conducted to gather biological samples for analysis, structured around seasonal rainfall peaks to assess trends associated with season/rainfall.

steps.description: Field collections were conducted between April 2014 and January 2015 at Cedar Creek and North Pine River in southeast Queensland, Australia.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct field collections at specified locations and times

steps.description: Sampling occurred at multiple time points over a ten month period, structured especially around the beginning and end of the austral summer rainfall peak.
steps.searchable_summary: schedule sampling around seasonal rainfall peaks

methods.description: Utilization of RNAseq data to explore patterns of differential expression within-species, including data assembly and quality assessment.

steps.description: Utilize RNAseq data for C. draysoni obtained in a previous comparative transcriptomic study.
steps.searchable_summary: retrieve RNAseq data from previous study

steps.description: Cleaned reads were assembled with Trinity Version 2014-04-13pl package.
Assembly quality was assessed using distributed scripts in Trinity to calculate number of contigs, N50 and median contig length.
steps.searchable_summary: assess assembly quality using Trinity scripts

steps.description: Transcriptome completeness was assessed via BUSCO analysis against the distributed set of arthropod single-copy orthologous genes.
steps.searchable_summary: perform BUSCO analysis for transcriptome completeness

steps.description: Open Reading Frames (ORFs) were inferred with TransDecoder Version 2.0.1.

methods.description: Annotation of transcripts and proteins using various databases and tools, compiled into a comprehensive report.

steps.description: Transcripts and protein annotation was conducted via searches against the Pfam database using HMMER, the SignalP Version 4.1 database, and the SwissProt and Uniref90 databases using Blastx and Blastp searches.
steps.searchable_summary: annotate transcripts and proteins using multiple databases

steps.description: Compiled into a report as per the Trinotate Version 2.0.2 pipeline.
steps.searchable_summary: compile annotation results into Trinotate report

methods.description: Analysis of differential gene expression using the edgeR pipeline, including extraction and reporting of significant results.

steps.description: Conducted differential expression analysis using the edgeR pipeline within Trinity, based on log2-transformation of expression counts.
steps.searchable_summary: perform differential expression analysis using edgeR

steps.description: Expression results for putative detoxification gene groups were extracted based on Blast annotations.
steps.searchable_summary: extract expression results for detoxification genes

steps.description: Sample correlation matrices and heatmaps of differentially expressed genes versus samples were produced using PtR.
steps.searchable_summary: generate correlation matrices and heatmaps using PtR
